name: Progressive National Bank
description_short: Progressive National Bank is a regional community bank offering checking, savings, loans, and commercial banking services across six branch locations with mobile banking access.
description_long:
Progressive National Bank operates as a traditional community bank providing comprehensive financial services to retail and commercial customers. The institution positions itself around accessibility and personalized local banking, emphasizing the ability to work directly with associates at physical branch locations.

The bank offers a full suite of standard banking products including checking accounts, savings accounts, CDs and IRAs, and both residential and commercial loans. Their loan portfolio includes mortgage loans with competitive rates, new construction financing, business loans, and residential loans. They provide mobile banking capabilities allowing customers to check balances, transfer funds, deposit checks remotely, pay bills, and receive account alerts. Account services include wire transfers, cashier checks, safe deposit boxes, and stop payments.

Progressive National Bank distinguishes itself through emphasis on local banking relationships and six convenient branch locations where customers can speak directly with associates. They offer free mobile banking and bill pay services, which are standard competitive features. The bank markets itself on simplicity and convenience across their service offerings.

The bank's fee structure is moderately aggressive compared to many regional banks, with $30 overdraft fees, $25 wire transfer fees for outgoing transfers, $20 account research fees, and various service charges including a $5/month inactive account fee for accounts under $200. These fees may offset the value proposition for price-sensitive customers, particularly those with lower balances or frequent service needs. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Mobile banking app with check deposit
pros: Six physical branch locations for in-person banking and customer service
Free mobile banking app with check deposit, fund transfers, bill pay, and account alerts
Free bill pay service with no monthly charge
Mortgage loans including new construction financing with competitive rates
Full range of account types including checking, savings, CDs, IRAs, and commercial accounts
24/7 mobile access to account balances and transaction history
cons: Relatively high overdraft fees at $30 per occurrence plus $4 daily overdraft fees
Multiple service fees including $5/month inactive account fee, $20/hour research fees, and $3 statement printout fees
Limited geographic footprint with only six locations restricts accessibility for non-local customers
Website lacks transparent interest rate information for savings, CDs, or loan products
Incoming wire transfer fee of $10 and outgoing of $25 are higher than some competitors
best_for: Customers in areas served by their six branch locations seeking relationship banking
Small business owners needing commercial banking and business loan services
Homebuyers interested in mortgage financing including new construction loans
Customers who prefer in-person banking interactions with dedicated associates
diagnosis: Progressive National Bank is best for customers within their six-branch service area who value direct relationships with bank associates and need comprehensive lending services including mortgages and business loans. The main caveat is that the fee structure is relatively expensive for basic services, with particular penalty charges that may discourage customers carrying lower balances or frequently using overdraft services.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
